title: Ligation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"80jqb","text":"Ligation protocol. Do ligation using a vector:insert molar ratio of 1:3.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Combine in PCR/eppendorf tube: Vector DNA Insert DNA2 ul 10X T4 Ligase buffer1 uL T4 DNA Ligase (added last)H2O to total of 20 uL
Gently mix by up and down pipetting
Incubate at room temperature for 2 h or at 16 C overnight.
creator: Snehadri Sinha
